jobs.name: Deliver high-value product increments
jobs.what_it_is: Translate market needs and strategy into validated product capabilities.
jobs.outcome: Features that increase adoption, retention and competitive advantage.

steps.description: Collect input from sales, support, customers and industry trends to understand unmet needs.
Clarify user pain points, business value and measurable outcomes.
Balance revenue impact, technical effort and strategic alignment.
Create functional specifications, UX flows and architectural alignment.
Release feature, measure adoption, collect feedback and iterate.

jobs.name: Maintain platform coherence and scalability
jobs.what_it_is: Ensure modules work together and scale across customers.
jobs.outcome: Stable, extensible and consistent platform architecture.

steps.description: Set guidelines for APIs, data models and module boundaries.
Prevent duplication and conflicting logic.
Track system health, refactor where necessary.
Align infrastructure, security and scalability improvements with growth.

jobs.name: Resolve customer incidents efficiently
jobs.what_it_is: Diagnose and resolve issues affecting customer operations.
jobs.outcome: Fast resolution, minimal downtime and high customer satisfaction.

steps.description: Categorize severity, module impact and business risk.
Investigate logs, data and configuration to understand root cause.
Deliver temporary mitigation or coordinate code correction.
Keep customer informed on timeline and actions.
Update internal documentation and prevent recurrence.

jobs.name: Increase product adoption
jobs.what_it_is: Help customers use the platform more effectively.

steps.description: Analyze usage metrics and customer workflows.
Provide training, best practices and optimization advice.
Relay recurring issues and improvement suggestions.

jobs.name: Win new enterprise deals
jobs.what_it_is: Acquire new customers in target industries.

steps.description: Target companies with fit in size, maturity and industry.
Understand cost pressures, inefficiencies and strategic goals.
Show relevant use cases aligned to persona jobs-to-be-done.
Quantify savings, risk reduction and operational gains.
Align pricing, scope and contractual terms.

jobs.name: Expand within existing accounts
jobs.what_it_is: Increase footprint through additional modules or sites.
jobs.outcome: Higher ARR and deeper platform entrenchment.

steps.description: Assess current module usage and gaps.
Map unmet needs to available capabilities.
Show incremental ROI and operational impact.
Formalize scope and onboarding plan.

jobs.name: Manage technology and service vendors effectively
jobs.what_it_is: Ensure external providers deliver value, performance and cost control.
jobs.outcome: Reliable partnerships and optimized vendor spend.

steps.description: Review SLAs, delivery quality and contract adherence.
Compare cost structures against market standards.
Optimize terms, pricing and risk allocation.
Ensure vendors meet security, regulatory and operational requirements.
